zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Laura Peckham於1440年出生在英國英格蘭肯特時，她的父親James Reynold de Peckham Esq.40歲，母親Alice De Wypeham26歲。她和William John Lovelace至少有3個兒子和4個女兒。她去世於1520年在英國肯特貝黑斯達享年80歲。

nameMeanings.name: Peckham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (southern): habitational name from East and West Peckham (Kent), Peckham in Camberwell (Surrey), or Peckham Farm in Framfield (Sussex). All three placenames probably derive from Old English pēac ‘peak’ + hām ‘village, homestead’ or hamm ‘water meadow’.

nameMeanings.name: Laura
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Feminine form of the Late Latin male name Laurus ‘laurel’. St Laura was a 9th-century Spanish nun who met her death in a cauldron of molten lead. Laura is also the name of the woman addressed in the love poetry of the Italian poet Petrarch ( Francesco Petrarca , 1304–74 ), and it owes much of its subsequent popularity to this. There have been various speculations about her identity, but it has not been established with any certainty. He first met her in 1327 while living in Avignon, and she died of the plague in 1348 . The popularity of the given name in the English-speaking world has endured since the 19th century, when it was probably imported from Italy.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Laura Peckham was born in 1440, in Kent, England, United Kingdom, her father, James Reynold de Peckham Esq., was 40 and her mother, Alice De Wypeham, was 26. She had at least 3 sons and 4 daughters with William John Lovelace. She died in 1520, in Bethersden, Kent, England, at the age of 80.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Laura Peckham est née en 1440, à Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, James Reynold de Peckham Esq., avait 40 ans et sa mère, Alice De Wypeham, avait 26 ans. Elle a eu au moins 3 fils et 4 filles avec William John Lovelace. Elle est décédée en 1520, à Bethersden, Kent, Angleterre, à l’âge de 80 ans.

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Laura Peckham(이)가 1440년 영국 잉글랜드 켄트에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 James Reynold de Peckham Esq.(은)는 40세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice De Wypeham(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 William John Lovelace(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1520년 영국 켄트 베더즈든에서 80세의 나이로 사망했다.
